# Future Plan

## Purpose
Capture unfinished work, deferred ideas, and next-step todos that should survive across sessions.

## Update Rules
- Add concrete action-oriented items with enough context to resume quickly.
- Remove, mark done, or move items into `progress-tracker.md` once they are completed.
- Keep the highest-value near-term work near the top.

## Current Follow-Ups
- After a little soak time, decide whether to keep or remove the backup object store at `E:\Dropbox\project\agent-setup\.git\objects.dropbox-backup-20260309`.
- Watch whether `progress-tracker.md` and `future-plan.md` need a lighter shared template after a few real tasks use them.
- Backfill these two continuity docs in older repos the next time they are onboarded or otherwise touched.
